title: JJBA Data Pack
description: This data pack is dedicated to the manga/anime universe of JoJo's Bizarre Adventure by Hirohiko Araki. It adds a lot of new features, like stands and techniques, that should make your game more interesting and bizarre!
body:
## HOW TO INSTALL

1. Download and install [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or an alternative to its features ([Entity Texture Features](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric), [CIT Resewn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn), etc.) for selected version of the game*.
1. Download both the data pack and resource pack for the same game version.
1. Install the resource pack by either placing it in the **.minecraft/resourcepacks** directory, or by dragging and dropping onto the “Select Resource Packs” screen and then enabling it at the top of the “Selected” list.
1. Create a backup of your world**.
1. Install the data pack by either placing it in the **.minecraft/saves/<world>/datapacks** directory, or by dragging and dropping onto the “Select Data Packs” screen and then enabling it at the top of the “Selected” list***.
1. Enter the world and use the **/reload** command.
1. Have fun!

\* This step can be skipped, although some visual elements (most notably, custom entity models) will not be displayed

\** Only if the data pack is being added to an existing world

\*** This can only be done during world creation

#
## For detailed information about stands, techniques and other data pack features, visit the official [Trello Page](https://trello.com/b/5m8aCa2c/jjba-data-pack)

### WARNING: this page contains spoilers for JoJo's Bizarre Adventure (Parts 1-8)
#
